raw_text: education dic 2015 - mar 2016 cadems advanced engineering center mechanical analysis using finite elements method with abaqus/cae. 350h. sept 2011 jul 2015 university of león aerospace engineering degree 7.4/10 final project: turbojet bench test design feb 2014 - apr 2014 university of león course in aircraft flight simulator. 150h *for further information about my education, visit my linkedin profile, listed above. soft skills teamwork communication fellowship flexibility integrity responsibility profile decided to study aerospace engineering by vocation, since have always had a special interest in the sector. currently enjoy my profession where learn and develop new skills every day, with the goal of becoming a better professional. https:// o +34645846131 q calle de chile 25, madrid. work experience may 2018 today airworthiness engineer in altran on behalf of airbus ds product integrity for a400m (flight test and retrofit aircrafts) and certification. military flight test permit management. (tasse4) apr 2016 - apr 2017 r&d internship in altran product designer and mechanical designer in new bleed system design for airbus 350. making the pneumatic pipe lines, with several valves, like pressure relief valve or double and triple bypass valves with respective cfd simulations. also doing 3d print prototyping. professional skills airbus knowledge: amm, amp, mrbd, mpd, pph, amam (software). cad tools: catia v5, nx unigraphics, autodesk fusion 360. cae tools: abaqus cae, ansys. office suit apps: microsoft office pack. languages english: b2 level (cambridge ielts 6.0) with abroad experience. french: al level. spanish: native.
